---
title: "Catherine Tolcher"
---

## Catherine Tolcher

**Dates:** (1826/7-1911)

**Maiden name:** (Archer)

### Description

second cousin of CMY

### Biography

She married Henry John Tolcher in 1850. She was the sister of the Rev. [[person:52]Charles Harward Archer]. CMY\'s grandfather, the Rev. Duke Yonge, had a sister who married into the Archer family.

### Letters

- [To Mary Yonge, July 1st[1899]](../letters/3409_To_Mary_Yonge.html)

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
